items.title: "Just over two years ago, Atlanta could have had Stephon Castle, Alex Sarr or Donovan Clingan, among others, with the No. 1 pick. Instead, the Hawks basically used Risacher for matching salary."
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: "Just over two years ago, Atlanta could have had Stephon Castle, Alex Sarr or Donovan Clingan, among others, with the No. 1 pick. Instead, the Hawks basically used Risacher for matching salary."

items.title: The San Antonio Spurs frontloaded Julian Champagnie's extension. This will give San Antonio a bit more flexibility later, as young players like Victor Wembanyama and Stephon Castle sign extensions.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The San Antonio Spurs frontloaded Julian Champagnie's extension. This will give San Antonio a bit more flexibility later, as young players like Victor Wembanyama and Stephon Castle sign extensions.
